data.title: GitHub upgrades status page with new performance tier, three-tier incident classification, per-service uptime stats, and AI model tracking.
data.description: In a significant update to its status page, GitHub has announced the implementation of a new incident classification system with three tiers. This new system will provide more detailed information for users regarding service disruptions. Additionally, GitHub will now be offering per-service uptime metrics, allowing users to track the performance of individual services more accurately. Another key feature of this update is the introduction of a dedicated Copilot AI model tracking system. This enhancement aims to improve transparency and accountability by allowing users to monitor the performance of Copilot AI models.

data.title: Indivisible Partners Welcomes Aligned Private Wealth to Its Growing Advisor Network
data.description: A recently established firm in the Chicago area is introducing an innovative approach called Aligned360™ that aims to assist founders and families in aligning wealth with purpose for future generations. Based in Clearwater, Florida, Indivisible Partners ("Indivisible"), an advisor-owned growth partnership, revealed on April 17, 2026, that they are pioneering this strategy.

data.title: Physical AI Company Chef Robotics Completes 100 Million Servings in Production
data.description: Chef Robotics, a pioneer in food robotics, revealed today that they possess the largest amount of in-production deformable material training data in comparison to other physical AI firms. data.title: HII Introduces Distributed Maritime Operations Framework in Support of U.S. Navy’s “Hedge Strategy”
data.description: A US-based seapower company is merging autonomous systems and modular combat power to enhance the deployment of advanced capabilities. This initiative aims to integrate cutting-edge technologies to bolster the military's effectiveness. The company's focus on combining autonomous systems with modular combat power is part of a strategic move to revolutionize military operations. This integration of autonomous systems and combat power will enable the delivery of high-tech effects on the battlefield. The company's efforts in this integration signify a significant shift towards modernizing military capabilities through advanced technological solutions.
